seoTitle: Coral Sea vs Coralie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coral Sea and Coralie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coral Sea vs Coralie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coral Sea and Coralie.
heading: Coral Sea vs Coralie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coral Sea, Queensland and Coralie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coral Sea has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Coralie (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coral Sea or Coralie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coral Sea has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Coralie scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coral Sea scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Coralie scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coral Sea or Coralie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coral Sea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
